title: Non-Database Field
text: Non-Database Field A non-database field is a Modeled Field or Component Field whose Is External property is F . It can be used for a control, constant data, derived data, or other non-persistent data. It cannot be used for database I/O or passing in an entity or occurrence parameter. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: fld Main Development Object? No Part of: Entity Contains: Value, Property , Code Container Generalization: Modeled Field Specializations: Non-Derived Field Compilation Output: — URI format: ent: EntityName :fld: FieldName cpt: ComponentName :ent: EntityName :fld: FieldName Related Links Is External Determines whether the Field's data can be externalized outside the component, either by storing it in a database or passing it in an entity or occurrence parameter.
